Instructions
  1. Select Pre-demonstration and complete the pre-test before the teaching session. Results should be sent to Dr. Shaheen at muscbodyimaging@gmail.com.
  2. Watch the teaching presentation and review the tube-placement concepts demonstrated during the session.
  3. Select Post-demonstration and complete the post-test after the presentation. Send the results to Dr. Shaheen for comparison.
